title: euphrasia tetraquetra
intro: Euphrasia tetraquetra is a species of flowering plant in the family Heterogenaceae, commonly known as a type of eyebright. It has been used in traditional herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help to soothe and heal irritated eyes, skin, and mucous membranes. The health benefits of Euphrasia tetraquetra include its ability to reduce eye inflammation, improve vision, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory tract infections, such as coughs and colds. Herbal preparations of Euphrasia tetraquetra can be found in the form of tinctures, teas, and eye drops, which can be used to support eye health and relieve respiratory issues.
